title: Bangarada Kalla
subTitle: A corrupt landlord is involved in gold smuggling, while the police try to apprehend the culprit. However, he is unaware that a person close to him plans to expose his illegal activities.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Auto
subTitle: Sathya's marriage fails after he incurs huge losses in his business. When he ends up driving an auto-rickshaw for a living, he gets another chance to change his life.

title: Fillers

title: Aaradhane
subTitle: A religious leader performs sacred rituals and worships the idol of a Hindu deity while chanting holy hymns to seek divine blessings.

title: T W R Daivanveshane
subTitle: The host presents an extensive range of consumer products from various popular brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Kari Gooli
subTitle: After suffering mercilessly under the reign of a ruthless tycoon, the villagers find hope in a Jallikattu bull trainer, who locks horns with the tycoon.

title: Jogi
subTitle: After a crime lord is murdered by Madesha, Nivedhitha, a journalist, sets out to meet him. She ends up meeting an old woman and promises to help her find her son, who is none other than Madesha.

title: Kalidasa Kannada Meshtru
subTitle: When the existence of his school is threatened, Kalidasa, a Kannada teacher who loves teaching the language, raises his voice against the education system that leans towards private schools.

title: Doddmane Hudga
subTitle: Surya, estranged from his wealthy family after being ignored by his father, returns years later to protect their land from a vile villain.

title: Martin
subTitle: In a twist of fate, a man trying to defend his motherland encounters his doppelganger, who turns out to be his deadliest foe to date.

title: Golmal Part II
subTitle: In a bid to earn more money, Radhakrishna, a married man, pretends to be the husband of Meera, a wealthy woman. However, complications arise when Krishna's wife discovers their strange arrangement.

title: Athi Aparoopa
subTitle: Upset due to his father's remarriage, Bharath leaves home. Eventually, he meets Aparna, a beautiful woman, and falls in love with her, unaware of her secret.

subTitle: When a rich businessman's daughter marries a factory worker, he tries to break them up by killing his son-in-law. Years later, his grandson decides to seek revenge for his father's murder.

subTitle: Bheema and his team try to figure out the science behind black magic. Later, they learn about Mruthyu, a demon who is hiding on an island and is murdering people with his powers.

subTitle: Jaggesh, always in debt, finds unexpected allies among his debtors, who hilariously come to his rescue. Set in picturesque Melkote, it's a fun watch!

title: Milana
subTitle: Anjali's father forces her to marry Akash. Unable to forget her past, she demands a divorce from Akash, but soon begins to fall for him.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: In a lawless land plagued by injustice and corruption, a police officer becomes a vigilante, protecting the innocent and punishing the guilty.

subTitle: Some of the villagers chance upon the temporary absence of a woman's husband and physically assault her, unbeknownst to the dire consequence that they would have to face.

title: Eddelu Manjunatha
subTitle: Eddelu Manjunatha is a 2009 Kannada comedy drama film starring Jaggesh, Yagna Shetty and Tabla Nani. The story revolves around Manjunatha, a lazy man, who wants everything easy and doesn't wish to struggle to earn a living.

title: Natasaarvabhowma
subTitle: An investigative journalist, Gagan, moves to Bengaluru and ends up living in a supposedly haunted house. Soon, he realises a change in his behaviour after falling prey to supernatural activities.

title: The Villain
subTitle: Ramu sets out to find his estranged brother, Rama, to reunite him with their mother. However, Ramu soon discovers that Rama is a mafia don, which makes it difficult for Ramu to approach his brother.

title: Raju Kannada Medium
subTitle: Raju, a village boy, travels to Bengaluru in search of a better job. Along the way, he faces numerous challenges that teach him valuable life lessons.
